text.p: I SHOULD HAVE REPLY UR MAIL SINCE, I JUST HAVE CHANCE TODAY I DECIDED TO REPLY. HOW IS UR FAMILY AND EVERYBODY MY NEW YEAR WISHES TO THEM ALL
tell aunty i want to hear from her

THANK GOD FINALLY I COULD HERE FROM YOU . THIS LETTER I HAVE SENT IT B4 AS I DID NOT HERE FROM UAND UR LINE DID NOT GO , THE PERSON HIS LINE GOES THAT I HAVE IS I WILL ALWAYS ASK HIM TO GREET EVERYBODY I SO FULFILLED THAT U REPLIED MY LETTER. WE ALL FINE BABY`S NAME IS , HE WILL BE TWO ON THE 3RD OF DEC , WE ALL WELL OVER HERE , I HAVE NOT GOTTEN ANY JOB SINCE I CAME BCOS OF THE KIND OF MY VISA WE ARE ALWAYS GIVEN THE SAME PAPER OUR HUSBANDS HAVE BUT BOLDLY WRITTEN NOT PERMITTED TO WORK . RIGHT PERMENENT STAY I CANOT WORK EXCEPT I DECIDE TO CHANGE IT, AND IF I DO I MUST USE IT TO WORK OR THE WILL CEASE IT YOU WILL NOT HAVE AT ALL.

NOW I AM DOING ONE COURSE THAT WILL ENABLE ME TO WORK WITHOUT PAPER, THOUGH MY HUSBAND IS INTENDING TO OPEN A SHOP FOR JUST TO KEEP ME BUSSY.GOD IS HELPING US EVERYDAY , REVEALING HIMSELF EACH DAY WE DRAWS CLOSER TO HIM. HOW THE FELLOWSHIP . HELP ME TO TELL THEM I HAVE NOT FORGOTTEN NEW GROUP. MY REGARD TO UR FAMILY AND ALL.

Complement of the season. i am so happy u understood my letter. u are one in a million , u dont know how i feels when i hears from u and ur family i feel not forgootten or abandonned since others has refused to reply my letters. for a little time i stayed in waiting for my visa i got to know the s.u orile almost all the members has written us so many times sending reading notes to us encouraging us during the period of waitings in our marriage when we had no to turn to none but God.The period i had to undergo operation for removing of tumor from my womb. thank God immediately after the operation i took in, 3 months later i had a serious bleeding also on th 4th ,but from the 5th month it stopped getting to the 8th month i started seeing water thru out till i put to birth.It was a normal delivery and today the baby is alive.This was the reason i could not tell any cos i dont know what will happen the next month. U can see how faithfull God has been to us.We have much of Gods faithfullness till i hear from u thanks and God bless u and ur family tell ur wife i missed her no mother like her hear. My regard to , , and .or is there another?.

Iam very sorry for delaying the reply to your letter of which Iknow you have forgivev me ,it is due to some circumstances beyound my control of which i know you will understand what i am really trying to say .How is the family and the ministry generally and how .is your job . Infact the reasson why i could not write since is bcos i did not know how bcos of what i was believing god was delayed so but thank God He finally has done it and so wants you to help tell brethren of Gods faithfulness. By Gods grace by Dec meddle or ending I will put to birth and our joy shall be complete and we will celebrate in full .Help me tell bro I am still expecting your letter his letter also bro and also exstend my greetings to all the members of the group tell them I am still expecting their reply :The most important reason of my writing is to tell you to help me in prayer for my safe delievery.
Till I hear your reply. thanks and God bless you.
